title: Timestamp Ordering Concurrency Control Flowchart
description: A flowchart depicting the decision process for validating read and write operations using timestamp ordering to ensure serializability.
elements: Data Item (X) with R-TS and W-TS timestamps
relationships: Transaction submits a Read or Write request on Data Item X
Request is checked against the current R-TS and W-TS of X
If request obeys timestamp order rules, it is accepted and timestamps are updated
If request violates the rules, it is rejected and the transaction is rolled back
